concerns.text: Task ID **T080** is used twice in the document – once in Phase 2 for the reproducibility verification script and again in Phase X for the SC‑001 extraction‑accuracy check. Duplicate IDs create ambiguity for downstream tooling (e.g., task trackers, automation scripts) and can cause tasks to be overwritten or missed. Assign a unique identifier to each task (e.g., T080a / T080b or new sequential IDs) and update any references accordingly.
